name: Bathtub and Shower Mats Clear - Room Essentials™
description:
Show off the cool, contemporary flair of your bath interiors with this clear Bathtub/Shower Mat from Room Essentials™. The embossed surface adds comfort to your feet while giving a firm grip on the surface. The suction cups along the bottom create a firm grip on the shower or bath surface. The clear construction and neat finished trim lends a minimalist appeal blending easily with any existing color palette. Place inside your bathtub for a comfortable bathing experience.

Directions: Clean tub before using. Wet base of tub. Place mat in position with suction cups face down. Press down so cups grip surface and hold securely in place. When finished with bath or shower, remove mat from tub. Not recommended for use on textured or uneven surfaces.
